name: Cornish Hens with Oranges and Onions for 100
recipeInstructions:
1. Line large baking dishes with slices of oranges and onions.
2. Cut the hens in half and place them over the oranges and onions.
3. Brush the hens with diluted orange juice concentrate, seasoning with salt, pepper, thyme, and garlic powder.
4. Bake for 1 1/2 to 2 hours at 350 degrees F, basting occasionally with juice from the bottom of the pan.
5. To make sauce, pour off juice from the pan and skim off any fat.
6. Add flour and heat to thicken, incorporating water or chicken broth along with about 10 to 15 tablespoons white wine and Worcestershire sauce.
7. Pour the sauce over the cooked, halved hens.
